text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon has managed to leave quite a
mark on the Twinkle Series.

Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

One day, while still basking in the glory of our
accomplishments...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I propose we play a game.
I listen carefully to what she has to say.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
After reviewing the data from the past three
years, I've realized just how much I have learned.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In particular, from an emotional standpoint, I
experienced things such as "joy," "frustration,"
and "the desire to win."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Since my journey in the Twinkle Series began, I
have observed many emotions.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: This led me to a query.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I wondered if the factors that induced these
various emotions were present not only in racing,
but in competition in and of itself.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
To explore this, I decided upon an activity in
which I am confident we can compete on equal
footing.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
We stare at each other and try not to laugh. The
first one to laugh loses. Will you participate?
I decide to go along with her proposal.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Also, the loser must do three laps around town,
handstand walking. Now, let's begin.
I could never make her do that... And there's no way I'm going to do it either.

If I want to nix the penalty game, I need to win
this! I put all my effort into pulling a funny face.

The sun eventually begins to set, but we're still
locked in battle.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I sense your fatigue. Are you okay?
choice_data_list: The muscles in my face are cramping up...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I understand your predicament. We must finish
the competition quickly.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Doing three laps around town while handstand
walking is rather difficult, so...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: The competition is over. I have lost.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
As I thought, competition is a curious
phenomenon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Regardless of how it ends, I still get the sense
that new feelings have developed within me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This experience has also helped me reconfirm
something...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Doing things together with you is... "fun."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Training, mountain climbing, racing—everything is
enjoyable to me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I'll be off to walk across town on my hands now. I
will return in time for training.
choice_data_list: You don't have to do that!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: But I must serve my punishment for losing...

Come what may, Mihono Bourbon and I will keep
doing our best to take on new challenges each
and every day.
